c.d: Total available collage layouts or templates to create collages
Supported mobile platforms (iOS, Android, Windows, Web)

c.n: User interface and ease of use
c.d: Quality of UI design—intuitive and user friendly or complex
Range and professional level of photo editing and collage design tools offered
Availability of free version, trial periods, and paid subscription or one-time purchase options
Features like adding GIFs, videos, stickers, AI-powered editing, background removal, filters
c.s: Shutterfly, Tom's Guide, Google Play Store

c.d: Options for sharing collages on social media, SMS, email, or saving locally
Average user rating and download counts as an indicator of app popularity and reliability
